unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Around 2.8 billion people speak the six official languages of the United Nations.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：b (billion) 与 m (million，百万) 相对，b代表十亿，数字更大。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 出生地的；本地的；土著的 n. 本地人
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Chinese has the largest number of native speakers, over one billion people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：nat-（出生）+ -ive（形容词后缀）→ 出生地的，本地的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What is the attitude of the speaker towards foreign language learning?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“矮踢兔”，个子矮的人踢兔子，这态度可不好。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Pronouns refer to something or somebody mentioned earlier.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：refer（参考）+ -ence（名词后缀）→ 参考，指称。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. 提到；参考；查阅 vt. 查询；叫……求助于
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What do the italicised words refer to in the sentences?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：re-（再）+ fer（带来）→ 再次带来信息供参考 → 提到，查阅。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phrase 指的是；描述；提到；查阅
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What do the italicised words refer to in the sentences?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：refer 与 to 连用，表示“提到”或“指的是”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There are many reasons why this has been possible, but one of the main factors has been the Chinese writing system.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sys（赛死）+ tem（特闷）→ 比赛中规则太死，制度太闷 → 体系，制度。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued all the way through into modern times, despite the many ups and downs in its history.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拆分记忆：de（向下）+ spite（恶意）→ 不管别人的恶意 → 尽管，即使。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: ups and downs vs ins and outs
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued all the way through into modern times, despite the many ups and downs in its history.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：up（上）and down（下）→ 起起落落 → 兴衰，浮沉。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There are many reasons why this has been possible, but one of the main factors has been the Chinese writing system.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：fact（做）+ -or（事物）→ 做出某事的东西 → 因素，要素。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 以（某事）为基础的；以……为重要部分（或特征）的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At the beginning, written Chinese was a picture-based language.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：base（基础）+ -ed（形容词后缀）→ 有基础的 → 以……为基础的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 以……为据点；以……为基础 n. 底部；根据
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The writer bases his argument on facts.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：爸爸(ba)色(se)衰，失去了家里的经济“基础”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：date（日期）+ back（往回）→ 日期往回数 → 追溯到。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells on which symbols were carved by ancient Chinese people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“波恩”，波恩的骨头硬。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells on which symbols were carved by ancient Chinese people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sh（沙滩上）+ ell（看成egg，蛋的）→ 沙滩上的蛋壳 → 贝壳，壳。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells on which symbols were carved by ancient Chinese people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sym（什么）+ bol（波罗）→ 什么是菠萝的“象征”？

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells on which symbols were carved by ancient Chinese people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：car（小汽车）+ ve（看成剪刀的形状）→ 用剪刀在车上“雕刻”图案。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: By the Shang Dynasty, these symbols had become a well-developed writing system.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：dy（第一）+ nasty（肮脏的）→ 历史上很多王朝(dynasty)的开端都充满了肮脏的政治阴谋。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. （植物、语言等的）变体；异体；多样化
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Over the years, the system developed into different forms, as it was a time when people were divided geographically, leading to many varieties of dialects and characters.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：vary（变化）+ -ety（名词后缀，表状态）→ 多样化，变体。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 主要的；重要的；大的 n. 主修课程 vt. & vi. 主修
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Emperor Qinshihuang united the seven major states into one unified country where the Chinese writing system began to develop in one direction.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ma（妈妈）+ jor（卓）→ 卓尔不群的妈妈在家里是“主要的”话事人。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: no matter vs as a matter of fact
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Even today, no matter where Chinese people live or what dialect they speak, they can all still communicate in writing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：no（没有）+ matter（麻烦、事情）→ 没关系，不管怎样 → 不论，不管。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Even today, no matter where Chinese people live or what dialect they speak, they can all still communicate in writing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：dia-（穿过，两者之间）+ lect（说话）→ 两个地方之间特有的说话方式 → 方言。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Written Chinese has also become an important means by which China's present is connected with its past.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：mean（意味着）+ s（复数）→ 意味着达成目标的东西 → 方法，手段。单复数同形。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 传统的；最优秀的；典型的 n. 经典作品；名著
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: People in modern times can read the classic works which were written by Chinese in ancient times.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：class（班级、等级）+ -ic（形容词后缀）→ 有等级的，一流 of → 经典的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 尊重；关注 vt. 把……视为；看待
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The high regard for the Chinese writing system can be seen in the development of Chinese characters as an art form.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：re（反复）+ gard（看作guard看守，关注）→ 反复关注 → 尊重，看待。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 文字；符号；角色；品质；特点
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The high regard for the Chinese writing system can be seen in the development of Chinese characters as an art form.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：char（茶）+ ac（客）+ ter（特）→ 喝茶的客人很有特点(character)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The high regard for the Chinese writing system can be seen in the development of Chinese characters as an art form, known as Chinese calligraphy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：calli-（美丽的）+ graphy（写，画）→ 美丽的写字艺术 → 书法。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：globe（地球）+ -al（形容词后缀）→ 全球的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 公共事务；事件；关系
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：af（阿飞）+ fair（公平的）→ 阿飞处理事情很公平 → 事务，事件。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vt. 欣赏；重视；感激；领会 vi. 增值
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：ap-（加强）+ preci（价值，price）+ -ate（动词后缀）→ 给予应有的价值 → 欣赏，感激。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 特定的；明确的；具体的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Scanning is looking at the text quickly to find specific information, such as dates or numbers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：speci（外观，种类）+ -fic（使……的）→ 归入特定种类的 → 特定的，具体的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It is believed that Chinese calligraphy dates back to at least the Han Dynasty (202 BCE-220 CE).
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 缩写记忆：Common Era 的缩写，意为“公元”。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. & vi. 斗争；奋斗；搏斗
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When I started studying German, it was a struggle.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“死拽狗”，和疯狗搏斗，真是辛苦的“挣扎/奋斗”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The words felt strange on my tongue, and the grammar would not stay in my head.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ton（吨）+ gue（姑额）→ 舌头重达一吨，感觉说不出话 → 舌头，语言。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I could see the world from a different point of view.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：point（点）+ of view（看）→ 观察的立足点 → 观点，视角。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What are the two pairs of words that the student is confused by? Tick them: semester / term.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拆分记忆：se（色）+ mes（霉）+ ter（特）→ 这个“学期”的脸色特霉。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: British English uses petrol while American English uses gas.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：petr-（石头）+ ol（油）→ 从石头（石油）里提炼出来的油 → 汽油。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The subway in New York is very busy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 前缀记忆：sub-（在……下面）+ way（路）→ 地底下的路 → 地铁。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They live in a beautiful apartment in the city center.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：apart（分开）+ -ment（名词后缀）→ 分开隔成独立套间的住宅 → 公寓套房。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He bought a new pair of pants yesterday.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：pan（平底锅）+ ts（复数）→ 穿着裤子坐在平底锅上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I beg your pardon?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：beg 和 big 只有一个字母不同，乞求(beg)得到一个大(big)包。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 同等的人；相等物 adj. 相同的；同样的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our relationship is close and we're equals, so I only need a few words.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：“一口”，大家分得同样一口饭，说明是平等的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I only need a few words to bridge the gap between us.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：g（哥）+ ap（一张扑克牌）→ 哥俩之间有一张扑克牌的“差距”。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 要求；需求 vt. 强烈要求；需要
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I must make my request longer—and I must make it a question, not a demand.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：de-（加强）+ mand（命令）→ 强制命令 → 强烈要求。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For me, vocabulary is my biggest problem.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：voc-（声音，言语）+ -abulary → 所有的词语汇聚在一起 → 词汇。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Does the writer give a clear description of the problem?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：de-（向下）+ script（写）+ -ion（名词后缀）→ 写下来的东西 → 描写，形容。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Does each sentence relate to the main idea?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：re-（回）+ lat-（带来）→ 重新带回来做联系 → 联系，讲述。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I just didn't feel that it related to my daily life in any way.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：relate 与 to 连用，表示“与……相关”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Around 2.8 billion people speak the six official languages of the United Nations.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：united（联合的）+ nations（国家）→ 联合起来的国家 → 联合国。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Chinese has the largest number of native speakers, over one billion people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：native（本地的，出生地的）+ speaker（说话者）→ 使用本国/本地语言的人 → 母语者。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Every little step makes progress.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：make（做，制造）+ progress（进步，前进）→ 取得进步。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: get used to vs used to do
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Listening to English radio programmes helps me get used to how fast native speakers talk.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：get used to + n./doing，意为“变得习惯于……”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I told my mum that I wanted to give up.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：give（给）+ up（向上）→ 把手举起来投降 → 放弃。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phrase 缩小差距；消除隔阂
unit_vocabulary.comparison: bridge the gap vs narrow the gap
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I only need a few words to bridge the gap between us.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：bridge（架桥于……）+ the gap（差距，沟壑）→ 在鸿沟上架起桥梁 → 缩小差距，消除隔阂。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phrase 理顺；整理；保持清楚
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't keep all the new vocabulary straight in my head.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面记忆：keep（保持）+ straight（笔直，清楚）→ 保持思路笔直不乱 → 理顺，搞清楚。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: phrase 开始学习；承担；呈现
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: That was the day I decided to take on a new language.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语记忆：take（拿）+ on（在……上）→ 把任务/语言拿到自己身上 → 承担，开始学习。
